emails.body: FW: Master Firm for Modesto Irrigation District Debra Dan I assume that this Master Physical has NOT gone out yet. Kim Ward called me yesterday to inquire. Please send out at your earliest possible convenience!!! Thanks, Jay To: Perlingiere, Debra
